flags.fix: If PPC shows 100 guns OR 50 butter, then at 60 guns the maximum butter possible is 20 units (using linear PPC: 50 - (60/100)*50 = 20). The point (60,20) is ON the curve, not inside it. Change to (60,15) to be inside the curve.
Correct Country A's resource calculation: 80 cars requires 80% capacity (80/100), 40 computers requires 20% capacity (40/200), totaling 100% which is feasible, not 120%
